dependencies: upstream RT-DETRv4 checkout importable through rtdetrv4.repo_path or RTDETRV4_REPO
generation_notes: Local ignored adapter generated as an external PyTorch worker testbed.
DeepDetect class id 0 is background; upstream RT-DETRv4 labels are converted to zero-based foreground ids.
Set rtdetrv4.config_path in CLI/API mllib parameters.
Set weights or rtdetrv4.pretrained_model to a pretrained .pth/.pt/.ckpt file or a directory containing one.
